title: Recipe UI passive observations proof
description: Drives Command Center UI links and records passive observation policies for Recipe v1 UI nodes.

pre_conditions.description: Command Center dev server is serving the sandbox UI.
Chrome CDP session is available for UI recipe playback.
Sandbox gateway is reachable for the Command Center session.

assert-observer-manifest.cmd: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const manifest=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('/Users/deeeed/dev/farmslot-wt/farmslot-3/docs/examples/recipes/farmslot-v1.action-manifest.json','utf8')); const refs=new Set((manifest.observers||[]).map((entry)=>entry.ref)); if(!refs.has('ui.screen')||!refs.has('ui.visible')) { console.error('missing ui.screen/ui.visible observer declarations'); process.exit(1); }"
assert-observer-manifest.intent: Verify the action manifest advertises passive UI observer discovery before driving the UI.

open-dev-dispatch.intent: Open the Command Center dev harness index where stable navigation links are visible.

wait-dev-index.intent: Verify the dev harness navigation links are visible before pressing them.

before-passive-observations.label: Before passive observation link presses
before-passive-observations.intent: Capture the visible dev harness links before exercising passive observation policies.

press-default-observe.intent: Press a visible navigation link with default passive observations enabled.

wait-ready-workspace.intent: Verify the default observation press reached the Ready Workspace dev surface.

open-dev-dispatch-again.intent: Return to the dev harness index for the selected-observer press.

press-visible-only.intent: Press a visible navigation link while requesting only the visible-target observer.

wait-review-workspace.intent: Verify the selected observation press reached the Review Workspace dev surface.

open-dev-dispatch-final.intent: Return to the dev harness index for the observation opt-out press.

press-observe-false.intent: Press a visible navigation link with passive observations disabled for this node.

wait-runs.intent: Verify the observation opt-out press still follows normal action control flow.

after-passive-observations.label: After passive observation link presses
after-passive-observations.intent: Capture the UI after link presses that exercised default, selected, and disabled observations.
